landing.heroTag: The First Investment Platform for Event Projects in the Kingdom
landing.heroSubtitle: A comprehensive platform for investors and major project operators — from Boulevard World to international exhibitions. Divide spaces, lease units to merchants, and track your returns in real-time.
landing.heroDescription: Whether you're a government operating company or a private investment group — the Investor Portal gives you complete control.

who.title: Designed for Decision Makers in
who.description: The Investor Portal is specifically designed for entities that manage and operate large-scale events, exhibitions, and conferences in the Kingdom.

audiences.title: Major Operating Companies
audiences.desc: Companies like Sela and others manage massive projects like Boulevard World and need advanced tools for space and unit management.

audiences.title: Government Entities & Authorities
audiences.desc: Entertainment and tourism authorities and regional municipalities overseeing national event projects requiring full transparency.

audiences.title: International Investment Groups
audiences.desc: International companies managing projects in the Kingdom that need a unified platform to manage multiple projects from one place.

audiences.title: Sub-Investors
audiences.desc: Investors who take over sections of major projects, manage them, and lease their units directly to merchants.
audiences.tag: F&B Zone Operator in a Seasonal Event

values.title: Smart Space Division
values.desc: Divide your project into commercial units (kiosks, shops, pavilions, F&B zones) with full flexibility and digital management.

values.title: Maximize Rental Returns
values.desc: Smart pricing tools and AI analytics help you achieve the highest return per square meter.

values.title: Merchant & Tenant Management
values.desc: Receive merchant applications, manage contracts, and track payments from one place.

values.title: Sub-Investor Delegation
values.desc: Hand over sections of your project to sub-investors and monitor their performance from a unified dashboard.

values.title: Predictive AI
values.desc: Occupancy forecasts, performance analysis, and pricing suggestions based on real data.

values.title: Enterprise Security & Transparency
values.desc: Detailed financial reports, complete audit trail, and compliance with ZATCA and SAMA.

steps.title: Receive Your Project
steps.desc: Register your event or exhibition project. Define the total area, location, and operating period.

steps.title: Divide Spaces into Units
steps.desc: Use the smart division tool to convert space into categorized units (Retail, F&B, VIP).

steps.title: Lease to Merchants or Delegate
steps.desc: List units in the rental marketplace, receive merchant applications, or hand over to sub-investors.

steps.title: Track Returns in Real-Time
steps.desc: Smart dashboard showing occupancy, revenue, and detailed financial reports.

items.title: Interactive Digital Map
items.desc: 3D Digital Twin of your project. View every unit and occupancy status in real-time.

items.title: Space & Unit Marketplace
items.desc: List your available units for lease. Merchants browse and submit booking requests directly.

items.title: Electronic Lease Contracts
items.desc: Create digital contracts, sign them electronically, and track each contract's status.

items.title: Advanced Financial Reports
items.desc: Revenue, expenses, and net profit. Reports compliant with ZATCA.

items.title: AI Investment Advisor
items.desc: Smart algorithms analyze your project performance and suggest improvements.

items.title: Continuous Enterprise Support
items.desc: Dedicated support team and personal account manager available 24/7.

items.name: Eng. Abdulrahman Al-Shammari
items.text: We manage 8 event projects across 3 Saudi cities. Before the platform, coordination was a nightmare. Now everything is in one place.

items.name: Ms. Sarah Al-Qahtani
items.text: The platform transformed how we work. Predictive analytics helped us increase occupancy from 78% to 96% in one season.

items.name: Dr. Fahad Al-Mutairi
items.text: As an international company in the Saudi market, Maham Expo provided everything — from electronic contracts to ZATCA compliance.

items.q: What types of projects can be managed through the platform?
items.a: The platform is designed to manage any event, exhibition, or conference project that includes leasable commercial spaces. Whether it's a seasonal project like Boulevard World, an international trade exhibition, or a government event — the platform supports all types.

items.q: How does the space division system work?
items.a: You register the total area of your project, then use the smart division tool to convert it into categorized units. Each unit has its own area, price, and status. You can modify the division at any time.

items.q: Can I delegate sections of my project to sub-investors?
items.a: Yes. You can hand over complete sections of your project to sub-investors who manage them independently. You'll track their performance and returns from your dashboard.

items.q: What is the level of security and regulatory compliance?
items.a: The platform complies with ZATCA, SAMA, and IFRS standards. All data is encrypted, with a complete audit trail for every operation.
The platform provides a complete electronic lease contract system. You create the contract, the merchant signs it electronically, and you track its status from start to expiration.

items.q: Is the platform suitable for government entities?
items.a: Absolutely. The platform is designed to meet government entity requirements in terms of transparency, detailed reporting, and regulatory compliance.
